name: /compliance-add: appends a new entry to .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml with the supplied id
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf 'Authoritative.
Widely adopted.
Government publisher.
' > why.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://www.nist.gov --id nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --why-authoritative-file "$PWD/why.txt" && grep -E '^- id: nist-ai-rmf' .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
